信息:
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
片名: Soukou Musume Senki
官方名: 装甲娘戦機 / LBX Girls / 裝甲娘戰機
类型: TV Series, 12 episodes
放映年份: 2021-01-07 till 2021-03-25
分类: military, mecha, power suit, game, science fiction, post-apocalyptic, isekai
链接: ANN , MAL , Official Website , Wiki (EN) , Wiki (JP) , Syoboi , Allcinema , Anison , Twitter , Crunchyroll
评分:  2 (156)

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
主役声优:
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
. Oonishi Saori .......... Kyouka
. Miyashita Saki .......... Suzuno
. Fukuhara Ayaka .......... Miharu
. Murakawa Rie .......... Yui
. Aida Rikako .......... Riko
. Oonishi Saori .......... Kyouka (LBX/Deqoo)
. Miyashita Saki .......... Suzuno (LBX/Lucifer)
. Fukuhara Ayaka .......... Miharu (LBX/Masquerade-J)
. Murakawa Rie .......... Yui (LBX/Odin)
. Aida Rikako .......... Riko (LBX/Assassin)

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
主要职员:
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
. Animation Work (アニメーション制作) .......... Studio A-CAT
. Character Design (キャラクターデザイン) .......... Horii Kumi
. Series Composition (シリーズ構成) .......... Mutou Yasuyuki
. Direction (監督) .......... Motonaga Keitarou
. Music (音楽) .......... Sakabe Gou
. Chief Animation Direction (総作画監督) .......... Horii Kumi
. Chief Animation Direction (総作画監督) .......... Hirayama Madoka

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
内容概要:
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
In an unplanned field trip, Rico is transported to an alternate Japan where metal-based lifeforms known as Mimesis ravage the world. Only girls equipped with LBX armored weaponry can stand up to this scourge. Joined by four other displaced young women, Rico will have to adapt to save humanity. The hope of a planet now rests on these heavy metal soldiers who desire one wish—to return home again! Source: funimation

注意：该信息最后更新于10­天­18­小时­前，可能已过时。点击这里查看最新信息。

#178090  珠洲島有栖 (おなかすいた)  5­年­2­月­前  


  
So, are you sure that your files are correct? (except for fixed filename/track name)

Have you made any changes to the downloaded files such as compression with flac.exe, or anything else? If so, you need to state them in the description.

I saw from the screenshot that your album variant is sold since 210128, but why you use 210129 in the title? And the new variant is said to be released at 210130.
#178099  匿名  5­年­2­月­前  

Yes I did compress the files to FLAC-8, and retagged to include album sort, artist sort, etc.
When I purchase at the store it says release date at 29, you can see here at the wayback machine https://web.archive.org/web/20210128150950/https://ototoy.jp/_/default/p/683269

Thank you for the feedback
